metadata.outlier_removal: within-cycle corr < lower 2.5% across all cycles
metadata.agg_method: PCA dim1 (SVD, sign aligned to mean)
metadata.id_trace_method: PCA dim1 (SVD) per ID/channel, then remapped by mapping.json
